nasb.text: Now while they were on their way, some of the guard came into the city and reported to the chief priests all that had happened.

esv.text: While they were going, behold, some of the guard went into the city and told the chief priests all that had taken place.

cnv.text: 她們去的時候，有些衛兵進了城，把一切所發生的事向祭司長報告。

ccb.text: 她们还在赶路的时候，有些守墓的卫兵已经进城把整件事告诉祭司长。

csbs.text: 她们离去的时候，正好有一些卫兵进了城，把所发生的事都报告给祭司长们。
